goal: Allow users to "star" or "favorite" jobs to shortlist them without changing their primary status (Applied/Skipped).
user_stories: As a user, I want to mark a job as a favorite so I can easily find my shortlist later.
As a user, I want to see a visual indicator (star icon) on favorited jobs.
As a user, when viewing the job list, I want a 'Favorites' filter option that shows only favorited jobs.
As a backend service, I must safely add a new `is_favorite` column to the `user_job_status` table without disrupting existing data.
success_metrics: The database schema is updated successfully with the `is_favorite` column.
Users can toggle the favorite status via the UI, reflected instantly in the list.
Filtering by 'Favorites' correctly displays only favorited jobs.
